reviews.review_description: I love this app and can get lost in it for hours! The app has activities you complete and as you complete them you win more things to create with. As you complete the activities you gain more experience using the tools . With the tools you can create amazing worlds that you can actually go inside of. Very cool game, my only complaint is that if you have to quit before you’re done with the session you’re working on, you’ll lose it and have to start over. One section involves a lot of flying and I can’t do it too long unless I want to get sick.

developer_response.body: Hi Nahli! Thank you for the feedback. We are working on some changes to the flying section to include various comfort options, this will be in our next update. Please let us know if this addresses the discomfort you have during the flying sections! We want to ensure a very comfortable experience for all players.

reviews.review_description: This game was not only entertaining but also relaxing. But just a little problem is that I completed all of the worlds but I still don’t have all of the blocks. I still don’t know if this is a glitch, or if I’m doing something wrong.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review, I'm glad you enjoyed the game! I hope I can help you with your issue. Are you viewing the Glossary and see that some of the items are still locked? It is possible you missed an unlock when playing. It is also possible you have found an issue we need to fix for you! Feel free to reply here in the review or join our Discord and I will help you there: https://discord.gg/ckn7Dt2Xqm

P.S. We've got another update coming later in this month with a lovely water system :)

reviews.review_description: The experience felt instantly relaxing to me. Creative freedom was the first thing that came to mind once I started decorating my world, the variety of elements is great, and the tools are intuitive and easy to use. It’s a lovely, chill VR experience when I just want to create and unwind.

developer_response.body: Great! Our goal is to help anyone feel creative in a chill and beautiful world. We've also added the new Pudu mode to shrink down and explore the worlds you build. Glad you enjoyed Cozy Worlds!

reviews.review_description: The most relaxing little big game I've played for a long time. I just wish there was a way to have more control of audio into couldn't mute the music or way to input your personal music collection

developer_response.body: Hi JimboT5000! Thanks for the review, glad you have enjoyed it. We rolled out an update today, and in the update, you can turn off the music :) We haven't looked into supporting a personal music collection, but that sounds like a good idea!

reviews.review_description: Decorating is so much fun and relaxing right away. I created my first world, Magic Valley, and I’m always excited to see what I’ll unlock next to make it even more colorful and lively.

developer_response.body: Glad you had fun and found Cozy Worlds relaxing! We've got updates coming with more items to unlock and new ways to build your world :) Thanks you for taking the time to leave us a review and let us know what you thought about the game.

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed slowly building my own world and filling it with trees, flowers and other little details. It’s a kind of game I will definitely return when I want to relax and quietly shape something nice.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are glad you enjoyed Cozy Worlds. Stay tuned for more updates to the game!

reviews.review_description: A calm, intuitive, and creative VR experience filled with nature and bright, uplifting colors. It's perfect for relaxing, building, and escaping into a peaceful world of your own.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Reviews are very valuable for us to understand what people enjoy and how we can improve Cozy Worlds. Thank you for taking the time to offer your feedback and glad you enjoy the game :)

reviews.review_description:
I played this game some time ago, and it's amazing how far it has come. It feels like putting my VR to go into a dream! We can create our own little worlds in any shape we want, and then watch it come to life right in your bedroom, they even have animals running around :P 

I wasn't expecting to like it so much but its a breath of fresh air in the middle of other vr games.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for leaving a review. We are thrilled you found Cozy Worlds a breath of fresh air! I thought I'd responded to this review when it came out, but we didn't... We saw it though, and we are happy you are pleased with how we've expanded Cozy Worlds since the demo. We've got more updates coming, and we're excited with what we'll be releasing :) Hope you'll check out the updates when they release each month!

reviews.review_description:
Lives up to its name -- super cozy, very relaxing. Same vibes as games like Tiny Glade and Townscaper, but with slightly more gameplay elements! Passthrough mode is great and the music is nice. The room-sized magic garden I made was really satisfying.

I completed the World Building content and am looking forward to updates. Super smooth experience for an early access title. Most of the controls are intuitive and easy to use, though the inverted rotate world tripped me up a bit, so that would be neat if I could change that in the settings in the future!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review :) We quietly released our first update last week and are working on our first official update for December!

Thank you for your feedback about the controls. We are working on an option to toggle rotation inversion.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing since the demo. Wow I can spend hours making beautiful worlds and look forward to the changes ahead.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and glad you enjoy Cozzy Worlds! We have a very exciting update coming at the end of the month :) We hope you will enjoy it. More details to come!

reviews.review_description: I like it overall. It's cozy it's relaxing it's low key.... but all my tools keep disappearing and I cant make anything else unless I start over

developer_response.body:
Hi SRRobotboy. We have updated the store version on 12/1 to address the issue that was causing you to lose your tools. Thank you for your feedback. I apologize for the frustration. 

ps. I intended on leaving my original response below, but Meta's tools keep deleting my response...to summarize, there was an issue whereby deleting a creative mode world inadvertently deleted unlocked tools. The new store version has fixed the tool deletion bug.
